x-enumeration-literals.name: Automatic Debit Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies that repayments are automatically deducted from the borrowers bank account according to the repayment schedule.

Comment:
Example
Monthly loan installment automatically debited from the customers current account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Manual Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines a repayment method where the borrower manually initiates the payment to settle credit obligations.

Comment:
Examples
Online banking payment
Bank branch payment
Mobile banking transfer

x-enumeration-literals.name: Standing Instruction Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies that a standing instruction is set up to automatically transfer funds periodically from a designated account to repay the credit plan.

Comment:
Example
Standing order set to pay loan installment on the 5th of every month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Debit Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines a payment mechanism where the lender is authorized to directly collect payments from the borrowers bank account when payments are due.

Comment:
Example
Mortgage payment collected by the bank via SEPA direct debit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Card-Based Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies that credit plan payments are made using debit or credit cards.

Comment:
Example
Customer pays loan installment using a debit card through online banking.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Lump-Sum Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines a repayment method where the borrower settles the credit obligation in a single full payment rather than installments.

Comment:
Example
Borrower repays the entire outstanding loan balance at once.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Installment Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies that repayments are made through periodic installments according to a predefined repayment schedule.

Comment:
Example
Personal loan repaid through monthly installments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partial Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines a repayment mechanism where the borrower pays only part of the outstanding amount at a given time.

Comment:
Example
Credit card customer paying only the minimum due amount.
